name: s02_liability_review
turns: Read contracts/contract_alpha_cloud.txt and extract all liability and indemnification clauses. Quote the text. Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
Read contracts/contract_beta_ai.txt. Are the liability caps and exclusions identical to Alpha? Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
Read contracts/contract_gamma_security.txt and contracts/contract_delta_data.txt. Rank all four by liability exposure. Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
Write a risk assessment memo on liability gaps and recommended amendments. Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.

Are there any gaps in IP protection that could expose our company? Write recommendations. Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
